app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.46 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for better main server recovery, fixed Sports embedded previews, and stronger protected-stream playback headers.
releaseNotes: Added a stronger main stream route with aggregated quality choices
Added required playback headers for protected main streams
Kept TV episode requests guarded against unrelated movie responses
Improved native stream priority so the strongest main links appear first
Fixed Sports embedded previews being blocked by strict WebView mixed-content policy
Kept Sports external redirects blocked inside the app
Added Sports WebView diagnostics for embedded frame and preview failures
Kept Kids profiles blocked from Sports

items.title: The Cube 2.0.46
items.message: Main server recovery, protected-stream playback, and Sports embedded previews were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
